messages.content: I will open the Spotify app on your computer so you can listen to your music.
I understood this is an OS task but I'm not sure how to handle: 'Open spotify'. Please be more specific.
I will open the Brave web browser and take you to the Spotify website.
I understood this is an OS task but I'm not sure how to handle: 'Open spotify on brave'. Please be more specific.
I will open your music player and start playing some popular hit songs for you.
